title: bidens flabellata
intro: Bidens flabellata, also known as the fan-leaved beggar's lice, is a species of plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to North America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Bidens flabellata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical application, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine.
